name: ISOFOL MEDICAL AB
summary: Isofol Medical AB (publ), a clinical stage biotech company, develops, commercializes, and sells oncology drugs in Sweden and internationally. The company develops arfolitixorin, which is in phase 3 clinical trial for the treatment of advanced colorectal cancer. It has strategic collaborations with Recipharm, Merck & Cie, Solasia Pharma KK, and Sahlgrenska University Hospital. The company was incorporated in 2008 and is headquartered in Gothenburg, Sweden.
